testcase.name: postShoudReturnCorrectResponse

failure.message:
Response content Expected: a string containing "Hello Juan" but: was "

Saludo: Hola Juan

"

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: Response content Expected: a string containing "Hello Juan" but: was "

Saludo: Hola Juan

" at demoapp.MockMvcTest.postShoudReturnCorrectResponse(MockMvcTest.java:38)
